title: centaurea ustulata
intro: Centaurea ustulata, also known as Scabious or Red Scabious, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a biennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Centaurea ustulata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
